metadata.title: About | Slashie
metadata.description: Slashie helps workers reach local jobs — free to browse, free to quote, no platform fee on the work itself. Open source and built with loop engineering.

en.heading: About Slashie
en.lead: Slashie is a platform that helps workers reach local jobs — free to browse, free to quote, no platform fee on the work itself. AI is eating a lot of careers — we're trying to help the people on the wrong side of that shift find paid work instead of sitting idle. Improve the unemployment rate a bit. Make the world a better place. That's the pitch.
en.productBody: Customers post local tasks on the map. Nearby workers send quotes. You pick who you want and pay the worker directly — Slashie takes no cut of the job. Workers can start on a free quote allowance or subscribe to Slashie Unlimited for unlimited quoting. Customers post tasks for free.
en.buildBody: Slashie is an open-source project, powered by an AI-driven company and created with loop engineering. Follow along on LinkedIn or browse the code on GitHub.

metadata.title: 關於 | Slashie
metadata.description: Slashie 幫助工作者接觸本地工作 — 免費瀏覽、免費報價，工作本身不收平台費。開源專案，以 loop engineering 建構。

zh_hk.heading: 關於 Slashie
zh_hk.lead: Slashie 是一個幫助工作者接觸本地工作的平台 — 免費瀏覽、免費報價，工作本身不收平台費。AI 正在吞噬許多職業 — 我們想幫助處於這波轉變劣勢的人找到有薪工作，而不是閒置。稍微改善失業率。讓世界好一點。這就是我們的主張。
zh_hk.productBody: 客戶在地圖上發布本地任務。附近的工作者發送報價。你選人，並直接付款給工作者 — Slashie 不抽工作成數。工作者可先使用免費報價額度，或訂閱 Slashie Unlimited 取得無限報價。客戶可免費發布任務。
zh_hk.buildBody: Slashie 是開源專案，由 AI 驅動的公司打造，並以 loop engineering 建構。歡迎在 LinkedIn 追蹤我們，或到 GitHub 瀏覽程式碼。
